name: Optimization Is Not All You Need
summary: arXiv:2607.11977v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: In 2019, OpenAI released two million GPT-2 outputs-ungrammatical, half broken-to aid the detection of machine-generated text. The alignment that...
description: arXiv:2607.11977v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: In 2019, OpenAI released two million GPT-2 outputs-ungrammatical, half broken-to aid the detection of machine-generated text. The alignment that produced their more fluent successors is usually regarded as an engineering achievement; we read it instead as the newest expression of optimization culture: the conviction, older than the technology,...
author: Minh Hua, Rita Raley
